announcements.title: Slack Integration, Webhooks, and AWS Terraform Stacks
announcements.description: Slack notifications, org-scoped webhooks, and Terraform stacks for AWS.

announcements.title: Nuon TUIs, Extensions, and Role Management
announcements.description: Workflow TUIs and CLI extensions are now generally available. Manage workflows, approve steps, and extend the CLI — all from your terminal.
